results.title: How The MacroGenics (MGNX) Story Is Shifting With ADC Pipeline Bets And 2026 Data Risks
results.description: MacroGenics is back in focus after bullish analysts raised price targets by about US$1 to US$2, including one move from US$3 to US$4 tied to the company’s recent Q4 update. These shifts are closely linked to Street commentary around the antibody drug conjugate pipeline, upcoming data expected in 2026, and reactions to the Tubulus deal and recent corporate activity. As you read on, you will see how these evolving targets fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch next. Wall...

results.title: Yordan Alvarez hits a grand slam for AL-leading 22nd homer as Astros blast Athletics 13-2
results.description: Yordan Alvarez hit a grand slam for his 22nd home run, leading the Houston Astros to a 13-2 victory over the Athletics. Alvarez tops the American League with 48 RBIs. LaMonte Wade Jr. and Jose Altuve also homered for the Astros, who roughed up Athletics starter Kade Morris in his major league debut. Morris gave up nine runs in four innings. Astros starter Tatsuya Imai struck out eight, allowing two runs in five innings. The Athletics scored their only runs in the third inning. Houston blew it open with a six-run fifth inning.

results.title: AbCellera’s Shift To Proprietary Drugs Puts ABCL635 And Governance In Focus
results.description: AbCellera Biologics (NasdaqGS:ABCL) reported positive Phase 1 results for its lead antibody, ABCL635, targeting menopause-related hot flashes. The company is shifting its model from partner-based antibody discovery toward developing its own proprietary drugs. AbCellera appointed Dr. Victor Sandor, a clinical development leader with experience in multiple regulatory drug approvals, to its Board of Directors. AbCellera has built its business around antibody discovery partnerships, and the...

results.title: Palo Alto Networks’ Mythos AI Push Meets Rich Valuation And Hot Momentum
results.description: Palo Alto Networks is using Anthropic's Mythos AI cybersecurity model to scan its own products and has identified multiple new vulnerabilities. The move marks an early example of a major security vendor applying advanced AI directly to product testing and response workflows. Industry commentators are describing this as a potential game changer for how cybersecurity vendors manage risk at machine speed.
